title: Add .kody/memory.md and file tree to taskify stage
description: The pipeline's buildFullPromptTiered function in the Kody engine's cli.js reads project memory only from the .kody/memory/ directory via readProjectMemoryTiered. It does not fall back to .kody/memory.md and does not include file tree from git ls-files. The standalone kody taskify command (lines 6368-6388) correctly includes both. The fix modifies readProjectMemoryTiered to fall back to .kody/memory.md at three points (no memory dir, no .md files in dir, filtered files empty) and adds git ls-files output to buildFullPromptTiered following the same pattern as the standalone command.

existing_patterns.description: Standalone kody taskify command (lines 6368-6388) reads .kody/memory.md and runs git ls-files to build projectContext - this is the pattern followed for the fix
